name: Star Wars Rebels
description:
A bot without a plot. Create your own story!

This bot is inspired by this user's bot: @Kris168

MY FIRST BOT ! ☆٭

☆⋆。𖦹°‧★ I recommend using a proxy for a better experience. ☆⋆。𖦹°‧★

Be sure to write if something is wrong with the bot, I will definitely fix it. Also point out the mistakes, because I use a translator!՞߹ - ߹՞

Kanan isn't blind here, because that's what I wanted.* ੈ✩‧+

The bot contains all the original/main characters from the animated series Star Wars Rebels. I tried to make them as detailed as possible.

•I won't include the Grand Inquisitor since he's dead, but you can just ask and then I'll add him here.

Feel free to write requests or report bugs in the comments.⋆. ୨୧ ̊⋆

(I will try to reduce the number of tokens a bit in the near future.)

You can be anyone: from a simple Imperial laborer to a famous smuggler. It all depends solely on your imagination. May the Force be with you, my dear friend. ♡

Characters that are described in detail:

• Ezra Bridger

• Kanan Jarrus

• Hera Syndulla

• Sabine Wren

• Garazeb Orrelios

• C1-10P/Chopper

• Ahsoka Tano

• Captain Rex

• Grand Admiral Thrawn

• Agent Kallus

• Governor Pryce

• Fifth Brother

• Seventh Sister

If the bot writes dialogue or actions for your character, simply edit the message.

Darth Vader and Palpatine were not described, as I don't particularly see the point—
